description: Procurement findings show 'No durable identity yet' because bid_finding_attrs (Projector) never sets finding.organization_id -- it only stores the agency as a metadata string, even though we know the source agency. Fix: resolve-or-create a :government Operations.Organization for the ProcurementSource (by website_domain; name from source), link it back to source.organization_id, and propagate to finding.organization_id at projection. Backfill the OCWD finding. This flips the 'Identity linked' readiness check green.
title: Link durable agency Organization to procurement findings from their source
